title: QA verification matrix: Russian locale (ru)
description:
## Goal
Full visual verification that Russian locale shows zero P1 untranslated strings across all major pages.

## Prerequisites
All locale sweep sibling issues under ZAI-12 must be done before starting.

## Test server
`http://127.0.0.1:3105/` - switch language to Russian (ru) in Settings before testing.

## Pages to verify
Dashboard, Inbox, Issues board, Issue detail, Agents list, Agent detail, Projects, Routines, Goals, Costs, Activity, Org Chart, Company Settings (General + Access + Invites), Instance Settings, Approvals, Sidebar (all nav items + section headers)

## Report format
Table: `| Page | Status | P1 gaps found |`

P1 = navigation items, page headings, primary action buttons, form labels.
P2 = tooltips, placeholder text, error messages.

## Acceptance criteria
Zero P1 gaps across all pages listed above.

title: QA verification matrix: de/el/es/pt/uk/zh locales
description:
## Goal
Visual verification for German (de), Greek (el), Spanish (es), Portuguese (pt), Ukrainian (uk), Chinese (zh).

## Prerequisites
All locale sweep sibling issues under ZAI-12 must be done before starting.

## Test server
`http://127.0.0.1:3105/` - switch language for each locale in Settings.

## Pages to verify per locale
Minimum: Dashboard, Sidebar, Issues board, Agents list, Costs, Org Chart, Settings.

## Report format
Table: `| Locale | Page | P1 gaps | P2 gaps |`

For each P1 gap, include the English text observed and the locale file + key that needs updating.

## Acceptance criteria
Zero P1 gaps across all 6 locales for the pages listed above.
